summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Kaelra Personal AI Operator. All 59 tests passed with 100% success rate. Tested all endpoints including auth, onboarding, dashboard, briefing (LLM), chat streaming (SSE), actions, memory, goals, routines, files (LLM), accounts, devices, notifications, audit, and privacy.

backend_issues.notes: No backend issues found. All endpoints working as expected.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing was not requested (backend only testing).

passed_tests: Auth: Demo login, signup (new user with onboarded=false), duplicate signup (400), login with correct/wrong password, /auth/me with/without token
Onboarding: Save profile, mark user onboarded=true, seed goals and memories from onboarding data
Dashboard: Returns profile, cards (calendar, emails, commute, news, goals, reminders, files_needing_attention, pending_actions), action_counts, devices
Briefing (LLM): Generate briefing with warm greeting mentioning user, actions_prepared count, cached briefing returns instantly, force regenerate
Chat streaming (SSE): Stream chat with session/delta/actions/done events, deltas contain reply text, list sessions, get session messages
Action Queue: List pending actions, create user action, approve/reject/snooze actions, edit action title/what
Memory CRUD: List memories with 10 categories, create memory, mark important/temporary, delete memory
Goals CRUD: List goals, create goal, update progress, delete goal
Routines CRUD: List routines, create routine, toggle enabled, delete routine

Files (LLM): Upload file with LLM summary (summary, people, deadlines, action_items extracted), assignment_reminder actions prepared, list files with summaries, ask about file (LLM answer), mark important, delete file
Connected Accounts: List connectors (8 found including mock connectors: gmail, maps, news), connect/disconnect github, coming_soon connector returns 400
Devices: Register device heartbeat, list devices (demo has 2+ devices)
Notifications: Create notification, list notifications, mark read, delete notification
Audit Log: Get audit log with events (action.prepared, briefing.generated, auth.login, etc.)
Privacy: Export user data (includes user + 11 collections), delete user data (throwaway user), verify data wiped
